evidence_boundary: Proves a public product-like QVG Quasar target can build and test in a clean Docker container. It does not prove production safety, deploy readiness, funds handling or mainnet/devnet authority.
policy_decision: Use this product-like proof as stronger Auditor input than generated-minimal Quasar proof, while keeping production promotion gated.
